summary: Solid stage‑right audience capture with a quiet, well‑secured setup; fans rate the recording highly despite no detailed show commentary.
review: Reviewers consistently gave high marks, praising the reliable and quiet stage‑right microphone placement that yields a clear, listenable sound. No specific musical moments or setlist details were mentioned, so the performance itself is left unassessed.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are positive (4‑5 stars) and comment on a stable, quiet recording setup; lack of musical detail limits the rating but overall impression is strong.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Stage‑right Sony ECM‑50 mic mounted on venue railing; described as secure, solid and quiet with no reported dropouts or distortion.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on the setlist or performance quality were provided.
